text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, June 08. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
